title: Crispy Italian Garlic with Lemongrass
description: This crowd-pleasing Tuscan dish features a spicy, crispy texture and a blend of lemongrass for added zest, perfect for a keto-friendly meal.
instructions: Slice the garlic head into thin slices.
Sprinkle a pinch of salt over the sliced garlic and let it rest for about 5 minutes.
Drizzle each slice with olive oil, making sure they're evenly coated.
Gently knead the salted garlic slices to infuse them with flavor. Let rest another 10 minutes before using.
Cut lemongrass into thin strips and add it to a pan of boiling water for about 30 seconds.
Drain well, chop finely and mix thoroughly with the salted garlic slices.
Season with freshly ground black pepper to taste.
